name: agentic-coding-fitness
description: Concept-by-concept recap of the Agentic Coding Fitness course. Each skill teaches one big idea (LLM APIs, tool use, agent loops, MCP, RAG, multi-agent systems, knowledge-graph memory, production GraphRAG + evaluation, model/framework selection), shows runnable example code, and offers an interactive guided lab.

author.name: Agentic Coding Fitness @ Rust Tech Bar
